# AGS AI Academy

> AGS AI Academy is a build-first AI academy in Puducherry (Pondicherry), India, and the training arm of AgileSoftLabs. Students become AI engineers by building real client projects, doing structured AI internships, and developing a deployed portfolio. Programs cover Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, LangChain, RAG, AI Agents, MCP servers, and AI deployment.

## Key facts

- Location: First Floor, 208, 100 Feet Road, Mudaliarpet, Puducherry, 605004, India
- Parent company: AgileSoftLabs (https://www.agilesoftlabs.com/)
- Model: learn by building real, production AI projects — not slides
- Outcomes: guaranteed internship, portfolio, placement assistance

## Programs

- [AI Foundations](https://www.agsaiacademy.com/courses/): 12 weeks, ₹15,000 — Python, data, ML basics, prompt engineering. For beginners.
- [Professional AI Engineer](https://www.agsaiacademy.com/courses/): 24 weeks, ₹49,000 — ML, deep learning, LangChain, vector databases, RAG, AI agents, MCP servers, deployment. Flagship program with guaranteed internship.
- [AI Startup Builder](https://www.agsaiacademy.com/courses/): 24 weeks, ₹99,000 — AI product design, SaaS/MVP development, customer discovery, fundraising. For founders.
- [Corporate AI Training](https://www.agsaiacademy.com/courses/): custom team enablement.

## Topics we teach

Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Generative AI, Deep Learning, Python, LangChain, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), AI Agents, MCP servers, Vector Databases, AI deployment, AI automation, cyber security, cloud, full-stack AI.
